prompt:
A beautiful baby girl naming ceremony invitation card in watercolor style. Soft pastel pink, lavender, and purple gradient background. Whimsical and playful design with watercolor butterflies (pink and yellow), small pink hearts, a pastel rainbow, and gold sparkle stars scattered around. Text layout from top to bottom:
Line 1 (small, purple cursive): '¡Es una Niña!'
Line 2 (large, pink script font, prominent): 'Elena'
Line 3 (medium, dark purple bold sans-serif): 'Ceremonia de Nombramiento'
Line 4 (medium, dark purple bold): 'Sábado, 14 de Marzo · 10:30 AM'
Line 5 (small, dark purple): 'Chabad of Coronado · 1033 B Ave #300,'
Line 6 (small, dark purple): 'Coronado CA'
Line 7 (small, dark purple): 'Brunch a continuación · 12:00 PM'
Line 8 (medium, purple elegant cursive at bottom): 'Eduardo & Sara'
Clean white/soft background, square format, elegant and festive. All text must be clearly legible.
